category_sources: Official NSIS docs and README describe NSIS as a professional open source system for creating Windows installers.
source_facts.description says "System to create Windows installers".
display_name_sources: Official NSIS manual and repository README use NSIS as the project name; makensis is the compiler executable.
source_facts.homepage is the NSIS official site.
docs_sources: Official NSIS Users Manual is hosted at nsis.sourceforge.io/Docs/.
repo_sources: Official NSIS Development Files page says source code is obtained using SVN and links to the SourceForge SVN repository browser.
SourceForge NSIS code page is the official repository browser; GitHub is explicitly described as a mirror.
tags_sources: Official NSIS README topics include windows, installer, scripting-language, and build-tool; official docs identify makensis as the compiler tool.
